caption: he told the same six stories every sunday dinner, word for word, forever. we finally wrote them down — his voice, his pauses, the parts he always laughed at before the punchline. a little world the grandkids can walk through whenever they miss him.

overlays.hook: grandpa told the same six stories every sunday. we finally wrote them down.
beats: his six sunday stories, listed like a table of contents
each one opens into a small keepsake room
his actual words, not a paraphrase
for the grandkids who weren't born in time to hear it firsthand
